text:
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and was published as a workshop paper at the 17th International OPT Workshop on Optimization for Machine Learning (OPT 2025), which was held in conjunction with NeurIPS 2025. My search confirmed the exact title, authors, and venue.

LINK: https://neurips.cc/virtual/2025/workshop/96918
FOUND_TITLE: FineAMP: Optimization-Based Automatic Mixed Precision Quantization for Efficient Diffusion Model Inference
FOUND_AUTHORS: Burak Bartan, Ruizhong Qiu, Rafael Esteves, Yuwei Ren, Weiliang Will Zeng, An Chen
FOUND_YEAR: 2025
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
